overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a witch character walking through a misty mountain landscape at golden hour. The character traverses rocky terrain and wooden walkways built along cliff edges, with atmospheric fog and dramatic lighting creating a cinematic fantasy environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with cable car overlook

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a rocky mountain path toward a misty valley, with a cable car system visible on the right cliff face

entered.detail: uneven dirt and stone trail winding through the mountains
suspended wooden gondola hanging from cables attached to the cliff wall
tall rocky cliff face with wooden structures built into it
distant fog-covered mountains under cloudy skies
sparse evergreen trees dotting the mountain slopes

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky mountain trail with a cable car gondola visible on the right cliff face. The atmosphere is misty and desaturated with distant mountains barely visible through the haze.

events.description: path transitions from rocky terrain to wooden plank walkway built along the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: traversing a narrow wooden walkway built into the cliffside, passing wooden barricades and crates

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a narrow path along the cliff edge
rough wooden fences and barriers lining the walkway
stacked wooden crates and barrels beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden plank walkway built into the cliff face, passing wooden barricades and crates. The path is enclosed by the stone wall on the right and open to the misty valley on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit rocky mountain descent with valley overlook

events.description: exiting wooden walkway back onto rocky terrain as the path descends
sun breaks through the mist creating dramatic golden hour backlighting

agents.ego_description: descending a rocky slope toward a sunlit valley, with the wooden walkway ending and opening up to panoramic views

entered.detail: tall pine trees backlit by the golden sun breaking through the mist
wide view of the misty valley below with scattered trees

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the wooden walkway onto rocky terrain as the sun breaks through the mist, illuminating the valley ahead. The scene opens up to reveal sunlit pine trees and a panoramic mountain vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desaturated, misty mountain pass that gradually opens into a sun-drenched alpine vista. It begins with the character traversing a rocky trail beside a cliff-face cable car gondola, where distant peaks are barely visible through a thick, gray haze. As the path narrows, the camera follows the character onto a wooden plank walkway lined with crates and barricades, squeezed between a stone wall and the open, foggy valley. The scene then shifts as the character descends from the planks back onto rocky terrain, coinciding with the sun breaking through the mist to illuminate the landscape. Finally, the environment expands into a panoramic view of the valley, revealing vibrant, sunlit pine trees and towering mountains under a clear golden light.
